headline: Stock Market Today, May 26: Soaring Tech Stocks Push S&P 500 and Nasdaq to New Highs
summary: On May 26, 2026, Micron’s surge helped propel the S&P 500 and Nasdaq to fresh records even as the Dow lagged.

headline: Micron, UnitedHealth, Rocket Lab, and These Stocks Explain Today’s Market
summary: The tech rally continued Tuesday, led by chip and memory stocks, even as it remained unclear which way diplomatic efforts would go between the U.S. and Iran.  Wall Street appears to believe a peace deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz is still in reach, with President Donald Trump saying Monday talks with Iran were “proceeding nicely.”  The tech-heavy  gained 1%, while the  rose 0.5% and the  fell 0.4%, dragged lower by healthcare stocks.

headline: Optum Rx Transparency Shift And What It May Mean For UNH Valuation
summary: Optum Rx, the pharmacy benefits unit of UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH), has introduced a new transparent, fee-based pharmacy care model. The model separates Optum Rx’s compensation from drug list prices and prescription volumes, focusing instead on a clear service fee structure. This change marks a shift in how pharmacy benefits are priced and delivered, with implications for patients, employers, and health plans. For a company the size of UnitedHealth Group, which operates across insurance,...

headline: Dow Gives Back Early Gains. Healthcare Stocks Are a Drag.
summary: The Dow gave back its opening gains, with healthcare stocks a big drag.  The blue-chip index was trading flat, while the S&P 500 was up 0.9%, and the Nasdaq rose 1.4%.  UnitedHealth Group and Amgen, among the Dow's top five stocks, were down by nearly 3% and 0.4%, respectively.

headline: SCHD’s Dividend Quality Filter Now Concentrates 42 Percent of Your Money in Just Ten Stocks
summary: Most investors buy Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHD) because the fund’s reputation tells them they are buying diversification. SCHD has 105 holdings, screens hard on dividend quality, and charges 0.06%. The retiree who built an income sleeve around SCHD usually has not read the holdings list. Read the list and the diversification story bends: ... SCHD’s Dividend Quality Filter Now Concentrates 42 Percent of Your Money in Just Ten Stocks

summary: Former FDA Commissioner Dr. Scott Gottlieb joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the latest developments on the Ebola outbreak, risks to the United States, GLP-1's impact on cancer risks, and more.
